extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10 time steps, the series either starts around mid‑level (≈0.4–0.6) or briefly spikes but then quickly drops and stays mostly below 0.5 by t≈10.  
R2: Between t≈10 and t≈30, the series forms a broad plateau or gentle hill with values mostly between 0.3 and 0.6, without a long flat low segment near 0.1.  
R3: After t≈30, the series shows two or more pronounced up‑and‑down swings (peaks and valleys) rather than one long downward plunge and recovery.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10 time steps, the series starts high (around 0.6–0.8) and then falls steeply to a clear minimum near 0.1–0.2.  
R2: Between t≈10 and t≈30, the series climbs from this low point to a mid‑level plateau around 0.4–0.6 and stays there relatively steadily.  
R3: Around t≈35–50, there is a single dominant tall peak (≈0.7–0.8) followed by a deep valley close to 0, after which the series recovers to mid levels.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 15% of the series, values quickly rise to a local maximum, then drop but stay mostly above 0.2 (no long dip close to 0).  
R2: Between 15% and 50% of the series, values fluctuate around a mid‑level plateau (roughly 0.4–0.6) with several small ups and downs.  
R3: In the last 40% of the series, at least one sharp spike upwards followed by a recovery to around the mid‑level (values rarely stay near 0 for long).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 15% of the series, values form a tall, early peak followed by a steep decline that reaches close to 0 (a deep initial valley).  
R2: Between 15% and 60% of the series, after the first valley the signal climbs back to mid‑levels (around 0.4–0.6) but remains relatively smoother and flatter than Class 0 (fewer sharp local peaks).  
R3: In the last 40% of the series, there is a prominent long downward excursion where values dip close to 0 and remain low for a noticeable span before partially recovering.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps there is a sharp *increase* to a local maximum above ≈0.7 followed by a rapid drop toward low values (≈0.2 or below).  
R2: In the central part of the series (roughly indices 15–45) the signal stays in a mid-range band (≈0.3–0.6) with several moderate peaks and troughs but without any long, monotone trend.  
R3: In the last third (after ≈index 45) there is at least one deep valley (≤0.15) followed by a rebound to mid/high values (≥0.5).
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps there is a strong *decrease* from a high value (≥0.6–0.8) down to a pronounced minimum around 0.1–0.2.  
R2: In the middle part (≈indices 15–40) the signal recovers into a mid-range band (≈0.4–0.6) and remains relatively flat or gently varying, without large spikes.  
R3: After a tall peak around indices 35–45 (≥0.7), the series shows a long downward trend reaching a valley near 0.0–0.1 and then only a partial recovery to mid values (≤0.5) towards the end.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the very early segment (indices 0–10), the series stays mostly moderate (around 0.3–0.7) without a single tall, isolated spike.
R2: In the middle segment (indices 20–40), the series shows a broad, relatively flat plateau around 0.45–0.6 with only small oscillations.
R3: In the later segment (indices 45–60), there is a pronounced deep dip (down to about 0.1–0.25) followed by a quick rebound to moderate/high values.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the very early segment (indices 0–10), the series exhibits a sharp early peak (around 0.8–1.0) followed by a rapid fall to low values (near 0.1–0.25).
R2: In the middle segment (indices 20–40), the series hovers at mid-level (around 0.4–0.6) without forming a long, flat plateau; instead it has gentle up‑and‑down variations.
R3: In the later segment (indices 40–55), there is a steep, long descent from mid/high values down to very low values (near 0.0–0.1), after which it remains low or only partially recovers.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 15% of the series, there is a strong upward spike followed by a sharp drop (early high peak then valley).
R2: Around the middle of the series (roughly 30–50% of its length), values stay in a moderate band (about mid‑range, neither near minimum nor maximum) with small oscillations.
R3: In the last 20% of the series, values rise again from low to medium or medium‑high, ending without a deep final valley.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–20% of the series, there is a high peak very early, followed by a long monotonically decreasing movement down to a clear low valley.
R2: In the middle portion (about 25–60% of its length), the series slowly recovers from that low but stays mostly in the lower–to–mid range without large oscillations.
R3: There is no pronounced late rise to a high peak at the end; the final 20% remains roughly flat or gently varying around mid‑range values.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10% of the series, after an initial moderate value, there is a sharp dip to a low value (< 0.2) followed by a clear rebound upward.  
R2: Around the middle of the series (≈30–40% of its length), the values form a broad plateau or gentle hill at a medium level (≈0.4–0.6) without a deep valley.  
R3: In the last 30% of the series, values oscillate but stay mostly in the mid range (≈0.3–0.6) without a long, sustained drop near 0.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Very early in the series (first 10–15%), there is a tall peak (≈0.7–0.9) that quickly drops into a pronounced valley near 0.1–0.2.  
R2: In the middle region (≈30–60%), there is a single very deep, narrow drop (often close to 0) from medium/high values, after which the series recovers.  
R3: Toward the end of the series, the values recover to a moderate level (≈0.4–0.6) but remain below the highest initial peak.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: After time index ~10, the series stays mostly in a mid-range band (roughly 0.3–0.6) with several medium-sized oscillations, rather than remaining very low for a long stretch.
R2: Around time index 40–55, there is typically a pronounced “valley” where the value drops sharply from mid/high (≈0.5–0.8) to low (≈0.1–0.3) and then rises again.
R3: In the last segment (after ~55), the series returns to and remains in the mid-range (≈0.4–0.6), without staying near the minimum.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: Very early in the series (before time index ~10) there is a high value (≈0.7–0.8) followed by a steep drop to a clear low (≈0.1–0.2).
R2: In the middle part (≈15–40), the series is relatively flat in a mid-range band (≈0.4–0.6) without deep drops.
R3: Around time index 40–55, there is a long, pronounced downward segment from mid/high values (≈0.6–0.8) to very low values (≈0.0–0.2), forming a broad “slope” rather than a narrow spike.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, values contain at least one sharp *upward* spike above 0.7 followed quickly by a steep drop toward ~0.2.  
R2: Around the middle (roughly 40–60% of the series), there is at least one deep *valley* where values drop below 0.2–0.25 and then recover above ~0.4.  
R3: After this mid-valley, the last 30% of the series stays mostly in a mid-range band between 0.3 and 0.6, without any long flat low segment near 0.1.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15% of the series, values start high (above ~0.6–0.7) and then show a strong *downward* plunge to about 0.1–0.2, forming a pronounced early valley.  
R2: Through the middle (about 20–60% of the series), values hover in a moderate band (roughly 0.3–0.6) without large spikes above 0.8 or multiple very deep drops below 0.15.  
R3: In the last 30% of the series, there is a long low segment where values descend again near 0.1–0.2 and only recover modestly (to at most about 0.5), with no strong late spike above ~0.6.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, there is at least one sharp peak followed by a rapid drop (early strong up–then–down fluctuation).  
R2: Around the middle region (roughly indices 20–40), the series stays mostly in a moderate band (about 0.3–0.6) with small, irregular oscillations rather than a single large trend.  
R3: In the second half, there are one or more pronounced spikes (up or down) but the signal tends to recover back to a mid-range level (around 0.4–0.6) before the end.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: The series begins with a high value and a strong monotonic or near‑monotonic drop in the first 10–15 time steps (early downward trend).  
R2: After this drop, the middle section (roughly indices 15–40) shows a relatively flat or gently varying plateau in the mid range (about 0.4–0.6) without large spikes.  
R3: In the second half, there is a single dominant deep valley (sharp drop well below the mid range) followed by a smoother recovery without strong oscillations.

extracted_rules.class_0:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, at least one local maximum above 0.7 followed by a clear drop of at least 0.3 within ~5 steps.  
R2: Between time steps 15–40, the series stays mostly in the mid-range (about 0.3–0.6) without any long flat high plateau near 0.6–0.7.  
R3: After time step 45, there is at least one sharp “valley” where the value falls below 0.25 and then quickly rises again by at least 0.3.
extracted_rules.class_1:
R1: In the first 10–15 time steps, the series quickly drops from a high value (around 0.7–0.8) down to near 0.2 or lower, forming a deep early “valley”.  
R2: Between time steps 15–40, the series stays roughly in the mid range (about 0.3–0.6) without strong peaks above 0.7.  
R3: After time step 40, there is a prolonged downward movement to a very low point (near 0.1) followed by a recovery, giving a single dominant deep valley in the late part of the series.
